findings.title: FR-033 (Report missing album) exists only in spec.md — not in product-spec / README / tasks Refs
findings.target: product-spec/product-spec.md FR table (lines 139-172) + product-spec/README.md:62 + product-spec/data-model.md + tasks.md T053a Refs line
findings.actual: grep -n FR-033 product-spec/**/*.md returns 0 hits. README.md says '22 functional requirements active' enumerating FR-001 / FR-004..FR-016 / FR-018..FR-020 / FR-028..FR-032 — excludes FR-033. spec.md has 23 active FRs; product-spec has 22. T053a Refs line is 'FR-005; CR-001; sync-fix L3-006' — no FR-033.
findings.proposed_resolution: Add FR-033 to product-spec/product-spec.md FR table aligned to spec.md wording; bump README active-FR count 22 → 23 and update enumeration; update tasks.md T053a Refs to include FR-033

findings.title: plan §5.1 Protocol method names diverge from code
findings.source: plan.md:455-480 (§5.1 code block) + plan.md:533 (§6 services table row)
findings.expected_per_plan: CatalogProvider: provider_id: str; search_albums -> list[AlbumRef]; lookup_by_mbid -> AlbumDetail | None; lookup_by_external_id -> AlbumDetail | None; cover_art_url -> str | None. MusicProvider: provider_id: str; get_recently_played(user, since, limit) -> list[Listen]; get_currently_playing(user) -> CurrentlyPlaying | None; get_user_library(user, limit) -> list[AlbumRef].
findings.actual_in_code: CatalogProvider has NO provider_id field. Methods: search_albums(query, limit=10) -> list[CatalogAlbum]; get_album_by_mbid(mbid) -> CatalogAlbum | None; get_album_by_external_id(provider, external_id) -> CatalogAlbum | None. NO cover_art_url Protocol method — cover-art is a FIELD on CatalogAlbum. MusicProvider has NO provider_id, NO get_user_library; get_recently_played(user_token: str, limit: int = 50).
findings.cross_check: tasks.md T048 Description uses plan-name 'lookup_by_mbid'; T049a uses Discogs-specific 'search_releases'/'get_release' (matches neither plan §5.1 nor code). Session 7 architectural decisions deliberately picked the code-shape — but plan was not re-aligned.
findings.proposed_resolution: Update plan §5.1 + §6 services-table row to code-aligned signatures. Code wins per Session 7 architectural decisions.

findings.title: plan §5.2 references non-existent lib/resilience.rate_limit symbol
findings.actual: lib/resilience.py exports timeout, retry, circuit_breaker, circuit_breaker_decorator, call_with_resilience, CircuitBreakerOpenError, CircuitBreakerState, CircuitBreakerStore, InMemoryCircuitBreakerStore. NO rate_limit function exists. MusicBrainz rate-limiting is implemented inline in MusicBrainzCatalogProvider via asyncio.Lock + time.monotonic() (providers/musicbrainz.py:131-143) — Session 7 architectural decision: 'rate-limit policy stays provider-specific'.
findings.proposed_resolution: Update plan.md:484 to describe the chosen inline mechanism; optionally add a one-line architectural note to plan §5.3 capturing the rationale.

findings.title: discogs_id (product-spec + tasks T063) vs discogs_release_id (code + plan + spec)
findings.actual: Code uses discogs_release_id field + unique sparse index. Plan + spec + change-log all use discogs_release_id. Product-spec/data-model.md introduces discogs_id (4 occurrences). tasks.md:584 T063 Description references discogs_id parameter.
findings.proposed_resolution: Rename in product-spec/data-model.md and tasks.md:584. Code is authoritative.
